prompts.title: Standard Code Review
prompts.prompt:
Review the following code for:
- Bugs and logic errors
- Security vulnerabilities (SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, etc.)
- Performance issues and bottlenecks
- Edge cases and error handling
- Memory leaks and resource management
- Code style and best practices

Code: $ARGUMENTS

prompts.title: Security Audit
prompts.prompt:
Perform a thorough security audit on the following code. Focus on:
- Input validation and sanitization
- Authentication and authorization flaws
- Data exposure risks
- Injection vulnerabilities
- Dependency vulnerabilities
- Cryptographic issues

Code: $ARGUMENTS

prompts.title: Performance Analysis
prompts.prompt:
Analyze the performance of the following code. Look for:
- Time complexity issues (O(n^2) or worse)
- Unnecessary iterations or recursion
- Memory allocation patterns
- Database query optimization
- Caching opportunities
- Async/parallel execution opportunities

Code: $ARGUMENTS

prompts.title: Unit Tests
prompts.prompt:
Write comprehensive unit tests for the following code. Include:
- Happy path tests
- Edge cases (null, empty, boundary values)
- Error handling tests
- Mock external dependencies
- Aim for >90% code coverage

Code: $ARGUMENTS

prompts.title: Integration Tests
prompts.prompt:
Design integration tests for the following component. Cover:
- Component interactions
- API contract testing
- Database integration
- Error propagation
- Race conditions

Code: $ARGUMENTS

prompts.title: E2E Tests
prompts.prompt:
Create end-to-end test scenarios for the following feature. Include:
- User journey flows
- Cross-browser considerations
- Accessibility checks
- Performance assertions
- Error recovery flows

Feature: $ARGUMENTS

prompts.title: Code Refactoring
prompts.prompt:
Refactor the following code to improve:
- Readability and maintainability
- Apply SOLID principles
- Remove code duplication
- Improve naming conventions
- Extract reusable functions/classes
- Add proper type annotations

Code: $ARGUMENTS

prompts.title: Architecture Improvement
prompts.prompt:
Analyze and suggest architectural improvements for:
- Separation of concerns
- Dependency injection
- Event-driven patterns
- Scalability considerations
- Error handling strategy

Code: $ARGUMENTS

prompts.title: TypeScript Type Optimization
prompts.prompt:
Improve TypeScript types for the following code:
- Replace 'any' with proper types
- Add generics where appropriate
- Use discriminated unions
- Add JSDoc comments
- Ensure type safety

Code: $ARGUMENTS

prompts.title: API Documentation
prompts.prompt:
Generate comprehensive API documentation for the following code. Include:
- Endpoint descriptions
- Request/response schemas
- Authentication requirements
- Error codes and handling
- Usage examples
- Rate limiting info

Code: $ARGUMENTS

prompts.title: README Generator
prompts.prompt:
Generate a professional README.md for this project. Include:
- Project description and features
- Installation instructions
- Configuration guide
- Usage examples
- API reference
- Contributing guidelines
- License info

Project: $ARGUMENTS

prompts.title: Code Comments
prompts.prompt:
Add comprehensive comments to the following code:
- Function/method documentation (JSDoc/docstring)
- Complex logic explanations
- TODO/FIXME annotations
- Parameter descriptions
- Return value descriptions
- Example usage

Code: $ARGUMENTS

prompts.title: Error Analysis
prompts.prompt:
Diagnose the following error. Provide:
- Root cause analysis
- Step-by-step fix
- Prevention strategies
- Related issues to check

Error: $ARGUMENTS

prompts.title: Log Analysis
prompts.prompt:
Analyze the following log output. Identify:
- Error patterns
- Timeline of events
- Potential root causes
- Recommended actions

Logs: $ARGUMENTS

prompts.title: Stack Trace Analysis
prompts.prompt:
Analyze the following stack trace. Provide:
- The exact failure point
- The call chain that led to the error
- Common causes for this type of error
- Suggested fixes

Stack trace: $ARGUMENTS

prompts.title: Docker Optimization
prompts.prompt:
Optimize the Dockerfile/docker-compose for:
- Multi-stage builds
- Layer caching
- Security hardening
- Image size reduction
- Health checks

Config: $ARGUMENTS

prompts.title: CI/CD Pipeline
prompts.prompt:
Design a CI/CD pipeline for this project. Include:
- Build stages
- Test automation
- Security scanning
- Deployment strategy
- Rollback plan

Project: $ARGUMENTS

prompts.title: Monitoring and Alerts
prompts.prompt:
Design a monitoring and alerting strategy. Include:
- Key metrics to track
- Alert thresholds
- Dashboard design
- Incident response procedures
- SLA definitions

Service: $ARGUMENTS

prompts.title: React 组件
prompts.prompt:
Create a production-ready React component with the following requirements:
- TypeScript with proper type definitions
- Functional component with hooks
- Proper prop validation and defaults
- Accessibility (ARIA attributes)
- Responsive design
- Error boundary handling
- Unit test structure

Requirements: $ARGUMENTS

prompts.title: REST API
prompts.prompt:
Design and implement a RESTful API endpoint with:
- OpenAPI/Swagger specification
- Input validation and sanitization
- Proper HTTP status codes and error responses
- Authentication/authorization middleware
- Rate limiting
- Pagination support
- Request/response DTOs

Requirements: $ARGUMENTS

prompts.title: CLI 工具
prompts.prompt:
Build a command-line tool with:
- Argument parsing (flags, subcommands, positional args)
- Help text and usage examples
- Colored output and progress indicators
- Configuration file support
- Graceful error handling
- Cross-platform compatibility
- Verbose/debug mode

Requirements: $ARGUMENTS

prompts.title: 数据库 Schema
prompts.prompt:
Design a database schema with:
- Normalized table structure (3NF)
- Proper indexes for query patterns
- Foreign key constraints
- Audit columns (created_at, updated_at)
- Migration scripts (up and down)
- Seed data for development
- Query optimization notes

Requirements: $ARGUMENTS

prompts.title: Docker 配置
prompts.prompt:
Create a complete Docker setup with:
- Multi-stage Dockerfile for optimized builds
- docker-compose.yml with all services
- Volume mounts and networking
- Environment variable configuration
- Health checks for all services
- .dockerignore file
- Production and development profiles

Requirements: $ARGUMENTS

prompts.title: 数据分析
prompts.prompt:
Perform a comprehensive data analysis on the following dataset:
- Data profiling (shape, types, missing values, distributions)
- Statistical summary and key metrics
- Correlation analysis between variables
- Outlier detection and handling
- Data quality assessment
- Key insights and actionable findings
- Visualization recommendations

Dataset: $ARGUMENTS

prompts.title: 数据可视化
prompts.prompt:
Create data visualizations for the following analysis:
- Choose appropriate chart types for each data dimension
- Use matplotlib/seaborn/plotly best practices
- Include proper labels, titles, legends
- Apply consistent color palette and styling
- Add annotations for key insights
- Create both static and interactive versions
- Export in high-resolution formats

Data/Analysis: $ARGUMENTS

prompts.title: 机器学习模型
prompts.prompt:
Build a machine learning model pipeline:
- Data preprocessing (scaling, encoding, imputation)
- Feature selection and engineering
- Model selection with cross-validation
- Hyperparameter tuning (GridSearch/Optuna)
- Evaluation metrics appropriate for the task
- Model interpretation (SHAP/feature importance)
- Model serialization and serving
- Monitoring for data/model drift

Problem: $ARGUMENTS

prompts.title: 特征工程
prompts.prompt:
Design a feature engineering pipeline:
- Numerical transformations (log, polynomial, binning)
- Categorical encoding (one-hot, target, frequency)
- Date/time feature extraction
- Text feature extraction (TF-IDF, embeddings)
- Interaction features
- Aggregation features (rolling, group-by stats)
- Feature selection (mutual info, LASSO, RFE)
- Feature store integration

Dataset: $ARGUMENTS
